name: IMagnesium Sulfate (MgSO4)
description: I-CNS depressant kunye ne-anticonvulsant esetyenziselwa ukuthintela kunye nokunyangwa kwe-eclamptic seizures (ukuxhatshazwa ekukhulelweni kwe-pre-eclampsia). Kwakhona isetyenziselwa i-asthma enzima kunye ne-torsades de pointes. Umgca wokuqala we-eclampsia ngaphezu kwe-benzodiazepines.
indications: I-Eclampsia (uthintelo lokuxhuzula kunye nonyango kwi-pre-eclampsia eqatha)
Torsades de Pointes (polymorphic V-tach from hypomagnesemia)
dose: I-Eclampsia yokulayisha idosi: 4-6g IV tyhala kancinci ngaphezulu kwemizuzu engama-20. Ukugcinwa: 1-2g / iyure IV infusion. Ukuba i-seizure iphinda ibuye: 2-4g IV ngaphezu kwe-5 min. Ukulayishwa kwe-IM (ukuba akukho IV): 5g IM impundu nganye (i-10g iyonke) ngaxeshanye.
window: Qalisa ekuqaleni kokuxhuzula okanye xa ufunyaniswa iimpawu eziqatha ze-pre-eclampsia.
warnings: Iimpawu ezinobuthi: ukulahleka kwe-patellar reflex (uphawu lokuqala, i-7-10 mEq / L), ukudakumba kokuphefumula (> 10 mEq / L), ukubanjwa kwentliziyo (> 15 mEq / L).
Ukubeka iliso kwi-patellar reflexes yonke imizuzu ye-15 - ukulahleka kwe-reflex = ukuyeka ukunyuswa.
I-ANTIDOTE yetyhefu: I-Calcium gluconate 1g IV ngaphezu kwemizuzu emi-3.
Nciphisa idosi kumonakalo wezintso -- jonga umchamo ophumayo.

pediatric.dose: Torsades: 25-50 mg / kg IV phezu 10-20 min (max 2g). I-asthma enzima: 25-75 mg / kg IV (max 2g).
pediatric.note: Ayifane isetyenziselwe ukuxhuzula kwizigulana ezingezizo zokubelekisa -- i-eclampsia luphawu oluphambili.

obstetric.note: Isalathiso sokuqala. Unqumla i-placenta -- i-hypermagnesemia yosana olunokwenzeka. Idosi yosana olusanda kuzalwa ukuba ukudakumba kokuphefumla: i-calcium gluconate 100 mg/kg IV. Yazisa iqela le-NICU ngokusetyenziswa kwe-magnesium yoomama.

source: JTS CPG: Obstetric Emergencies / Eclampsia Management Guidelines / ACOG
